response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The lyrics match the reference song lyrics perfectly, while the talk segment was transcribed and translated manually based on the audio and on-screen cues. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics from the Reference JSON were utilized, timed, and formatted carefully; talk segment dialogue was manually transcribed as the JSON had no reference for it. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed tightly to each spoken word and vocal cue to prevent any cascading delays, especially during rapid conversational exchanges in the introductory part.

subtitles.original: みんなでやろう！みんなで、あーと...
subtitles.english: Let's do it together! Everyone, let's...

subtitles.original: Oh, let's do it together! / Together!

subtitles.original: Oh, yeah, okay, okay, okay.

subtitles.original: ねね先輩が一番チャラいわ！
subtitles.english: Nene-senpai is the most flashy!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！チャラ！チャラ！
subtitles.english: Yay! Flashy! Flashy!

subtitles.original: That was most cute and chara, but...
subtitles.english: That was so cute and flashy, but...

subtitles.original: チャラ！チャラ！
subtitles.english: Flashy! Flashy!

subtitles.original: That was marvelous! What a marvelous time we had! Yes!
subtitles.english: That was marvelous! What a marvelous time we had! Yes!

subtitles.original: But sadly, oh no, it's come to our last tune in it!
subtitles.english: But sadly, oh no, it's come to our last tune!

subtitles.original: I must prepare for the grand finale! I shall return very soon, gang!
subtitles.english: I must prepare for the grand finale! I shall return very soon, gang!

subtitles.original: Nene, Iroha, please keep the audience entertained for a moment. Look after them, okay?
subtitles.english: Nene, Iroha, please keep the audience entertained for a moment. Look after them, okay?

subtitles.original: Two of you, look after them, warriors! Okay, see you soon!
subtitles.english: Two of you, look after them, warriors! Okay, see you soon!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！頑張ってー！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! Good luck!

subtitles.original: さあ、今夜のスターの、リズは、一体最後に何を見せてくれるんでしょうか！
subtitles.english: Now, what kind of final performance will tonight's star, Ryz, show us...

subtitles.english: We are so excited! Everyone, stay tuned just as you are, and now...

subtitles.english: ...let's go! Here we go!
